main_quests.title: The First Spark
objectives: Speak to Elara in the Oakhaven Archives
Navigate the Sunken Library
Defeat the Ink-Bound Librarian
Reclaim the Shard of Identity
main_quests.narrative_unlock: Kaelen remembers his name and the ability to read ancient script.

main_quests.title: Heart of the Woods
objectives: Locate the entrance to the Whispering Woods
Use the Compassion Pulse to open the bramble gate
Reach the center of the Great Willow
Defeat the Blighted Dryad
main_quests.narrative_unlock: Kaelen recalls the feeling of connection to nature and the faces of the people he once protected.

main_quests.title: Forging the Will
objectives: Cross the Ashen Battlefield
Infiltrate the Iron Forge
Defeat the memory of General Vaxas
Retrieve the Shard of Courage
main_quests.narrative_unlock: Kaelen remembers the wars of old and accepts his role as a warrior, not just a watcher.

main_quests.title: The Edge of Thought
objectives: Ascend the Sky-Staircase
Navigate the Hall of Infinite Regret
Defeat Malakor, the Unwritten
Rebuild the Aegis of Truth
main_quests.narrative_unlock: The choice: Full Immortality or Mortal Peace.

side_quests.title: The Bread of Life
objectives: Find the Sourdough Starter in the Hidden Grotto
Return the starter to Bram in Oakhaven
side_quests.status_change: Bram moves to the Central Plaza; Oakhaven's visual saturation increases.

side_quests.title: The Gilded Compass
objectives: Retrieve the Magnetic Ore from the depths of the Iron Forge
Deliver Ore to Milo's caravan
side_quests.status_change: Milo opens a permanent 'Rare Materials' shop in Oakhaven.

side_quests.title: Unfinished Duty
objectives: Collect the 3 parts of the Iron Legion Banner
Plant the banner at the Summit of Remembrance
side_quests.status_change: Sir Kestral's ghost finds peace and fades, leaving behind a permanent Stat Upgrade.
